titlestmt.titleproper: Pamphlets on venereal disease (sexually transmitted disease)
Venereal disease (sexually transmitted disease), pamphlets on
titlestmt.author: Katherine Isham

publicationstmt.publisher: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday April 23, 2024 at 02:00

did.unittitle: Pamphlets on venereal disease (sexually transmitted disease)

corpname.part: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

did.abstract: The collection includes printed materials on venereal disease issued by the United States Public Health Service and other government agencies, the New York State Bureau of Health, and other organizations in the United States and Europe from 1910-1961. Topics include facts about syphilis and gonorrhea, treatment of sexually transmitted diseases, rates of infection, blood tests, and pregnancy complications from syphilis infection.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized in four series: Series I. United States Public Health Service and other government agencies, 1915-1961. Series II. New York Department of Health, Bureau of Social Hygiene, 1933-1940, undated. Series III. United States, other sources, 1910-1943, undated. Series IV. Other countries, 1915-1940, undated.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Pamphlets on venereal disease. Historical Library, Harvey Cushing / John Hay Whitney Medical Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes printed materials on venereal disease issued by the United States Public Health Service and other government agencies, the New York State Bureau of Health, and other organizations in the United States and Europe from 1910-1961. Topics include facts about syphilis and gonorrhea, treatment of sexually transmitted diseases, rates of infection, and blood tests before marriage to prevent transmission of sexually transmitted diseases to children.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

did.unittitle: United States Public Health Service and other government agencies
Stimpson, W. G., United States Public Health Service, Treatment of syphilis . Washington D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1915.
Blue, Rupert, United States Public Health Service, Keeping fit . V.D. Bulletin no. 1. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1918.

Blue, Rupert, United States Public Health Service, Responsibility of druggists to the public health: a special bulletin on venereal diseases . Venereal Disease Bulletin no. 2. Washington, D.C.: Goverment Printing Office, 1918.
Blue, Rupert, United States Public Health Service, Fit to fight . V.D. Bulletin no. 3. Washington D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1918.
United States Public Health Service, Why should high schools and colleges provide Sex instruction? V.D. no. 10. Washington D.C., circa 1915.
United States Public Health Service, When they come home . V.D. Pamphlet no. 23. Washington D.C., 1918.
United States Public Health Service, Venereal diseases and the war . V.D. no. 27. Washington, D.C., circa 1919
Blue, Rupert, United States Public Health Service, An appeal to physicians for cooperation in the fight against venereal diseases . V.D. no. 35. Washington, D.C., circa 1919.
United States Public Health Service, Ravage of innocents must stop . V.D. Pamphlet no. 42. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1919.
Blue, Rupert, United States Public Health Service, The public health nurse and venereal disease control . V.D. Bulletin no. 43. Washington, D.C., circa 1919.
United States Public Health Service, Keeping fit: an exhibit for older boys and young men . V.D. Pamphlet no. 45. Washington D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1919.
United States Public Health Service, The percentage of venereal diseases among approximately the second million drafted men-by cities . V.D. no. 47. Washington, D.C., circa 1919
United States Public Health Service, How to fight venereal diseases in your city . V.D. Pamphlet no. 48. Washington, D.C.,circa 1919.
United States Public Health Service, A high school course in physiology in which the facts of sex are taught . V.D. Bulletin no. 50. Washington D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1919
Blue, Rupert, United States Public Health Service, An appeal to dentists for cooperation in the fight against venereal diseases . V.D. no. 52. Washington, D.C., circa 1919.
United States Public Health Service, The case against the Red Light District . V.D. no. 54. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1920

United States Public Health Service, The wonderful story of life: a mother's talks with her daughter regarding life and its reproduction . V.D. no. 59. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office,1921.
United States Public Health Service, Sex education in the home . V.D. Pamphlet no. 61. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1920.
United States Public Health Service, Outdoing the ostrich: a pamplet for good citizens . Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1920
United States Public Health Service, Outdoing the ostrich: a pamplet for good citizens . V.D.B. 62. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1926
United States Public Health Service, A square deal for the boy in industry: for those interested in work with boys . V.D. no. 64. Washington, D.C.:Government Printing Office, 1920.
United States Public Health Service, All-America Conference on venereal diseases . Washington, D.C., December 6 to 11, 1920

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials include Preliminary program, Plan of meetings, and three letters.

did.unittitle: United States Public Health Service, An open forum on the "open house" . V.D. no. 68. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1921.
Edson, Newell W., United States Public Health Service, The status of sex education in high schools . V.D.B. no. 69. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1922.
United States Public Health Service, Dividends from venereal disease control . V.D. 70. Washington, D.C., circa 1922.
United States Public Health Service, Congenital syphilis. Compilation no. 2. Washington, D.C., 1924.
United States Public Health Service, The venereal diseases . V.D. Bulletin no. 73B. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, circa 1926.
United States Public Health Service, The need for sex education: for parents and their children . V.D. no. 74. Washington, D.C.: U.S. Government Printing Office, undated.

Le Blanc, Thomas J., United States Public Health Service, Venereal disease incidence at different ages in certain Southern states . Venereal Disease Bulletin. no. 78. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1925.

Deacon, W.J.V., M.D., United States Public Health Service, A statistical study of 60,000 cases of venereal disease . Venereal Disease Bulletin. no. 79. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1925.
United States Public Health Service, Health maintenance: the relief and prevention of venereal diseases . V.D.B. 80. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, circa 1925.
Cumming, Hugh S., United States Public Health Service, Venereal disease manual for social and corrective agencies . V.D.B. 82. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1926.
Lavinder, C.H., United States Public Health Service, Where away?: some things worth knowing about venereal disease . V.D.B. no. 85. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1927.
Cole, H.N, M.D., The diagnosis and treatment of chancroid . Venereal Disease Information, Vol. X, no. 1. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1929
Moore, Joseph Earle, M.D., The management of syphilis in general practice , Vol. X., no. 2. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1929
United States Public Health Service, The prevention of venereal diseases . V.D. Bulletin no. 88. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1929.
Parran, Thomas Jr., United States Public Health Service, Catalogue of educational material distributed by the Divison of Venereal Diseases . Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1930.

Cumming, Hugh S., United States Public Health Service, Trend of syphilis and gonorrhea in the United States: based on treated cases . Venereal Disease Information, Vol. 16, no. 5, May 1935. Washington, D.C: Government Printing Office, 1935.

Parran, Thomas, United States Public Health Service, Cardiovascular syphilis: cooperative clinical studies in the treatment of syphilis . Venereal Disease Information, Vol. 17, no. 4, April 1936. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1936
United States Public Health Service, Important confidential information (gonorrhea). Excerpt from V.D. Pamphlet no. 31, Washington, D.C., circa 1936.

United States Public Health Service, The wonderful story of life: a parent's talks with children regarding life and its reproduction . V.D. Bulletin, no. 59. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1937.
Parran, Thomas, United States Public Health Service, Syphilis: its cause its spread its cure. Venereal Disease Bulletin, no. 91. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1937.
Parran, Thomas, United States Public Health Service, Gonorrhea: its cause its spread its cure . Venereal Disease Bulletin, no. 92. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1937.
Broughton, Philip S., United States Public Health Service, Behind the syphilis campaign. Public Affairs Pamphlets, no. 24. New York, NY: Public Affairs Committee, Incorporated, 1938.

United States Public Health Service, The wonderful story of life: a parent's talks with children regarding life and its reproduction. V.D. Bulletin, no. 59. Washington, D.C.: United States Government Printing Office, 1940.
United States Public Health Service, Venereal disease and national defense. VD Folder No. 7. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1941.

Hinrichsen, Josephine, M.D., United States Public Health Service, Modern serologic tests for syphilis and their interpretation by the physician. Supplement no. 14 to Venereal Disease Information. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1941.
Department of the Navy, Bureau of Medicine & Surgery, Sex hygiene and venereal disease. Washington, D.C.: U.S. Government Printing Office, 1942
Social Protection Division, U.S. Office of Community War Services, Federal Security Agency, Meet your enemy - venereal disease. Washington, D.C.: U.S. Government Printing Office, 1944.

United States Public Health Service, Postwar: venereal disease control: proceedings, National Conference, St. Louis, Missouri, November 1944. Supplement no. 20 to The Journal of Venereal Disease Information Federal Security Agency. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1945.
United States Public Health Service, Requirements of premarital legislation. Bulletin No. 98. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1945.
United States Public Health Service, Protecting the unborn baby from syphilis. VD Folder No. 3. Washington, D.C.: U.S. Government Printing Office, 1946

Moore, Joseph Earle, M.D., The diagnosis of syphilis by the general practitioner. Supplement 23 to The Journal of Venereal Disease Information. Washington, D.C.: United States Government Printing Office, 1949.

U.S. Department of Health, Education, and Welfare, Public Health Service, The eradication of syphilis: a task force report to the Surgeon General Public Health Service on syphilis control in the United States. Washington, D.C.,1961.
New York Department of Health, Bureau of Social Hygiene
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Before you marry. New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Clinical digest of syphilis in the newborn . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Clinical digest of syphilis in pregnancy . New York, NY, undated
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Dental practice and syphillis . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Diagnosis and management of congenital syphilis . New York, NY, undated
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Diagnosis and treatment of Lymphogranuloma Venereum and chancroid . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, The eruption of syphilis: differential diagnosis . New York, NY, undated

Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Facilities offered by the Bureau of Social Hygiene of the New York City Health Department to the physician-in-practice to aid him to gain and retain patients with venereal diseases . New York Physician, NY, May 1940.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, For expectant mothers . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, The golden opportunity . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Instructions to parents regarding vaginitis. Empire State Printing Corp, New York, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Management of gonorrhea in the male and female . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, A message from your health dept . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Modern syphilis control . New York, NY

Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Office procedures in the laboratory diagnosis of venereal diseases: a summary of present day methods for the general practitioner . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Preserve your life. Keep yourself physically fit . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Quiz compend . New York, NY, undated
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Recommended nomenclature in reporting syphilis . New York, NY, undated
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Social hygiene broadsides: Public health is purchasable! . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Syphilis: its diagnosis and treatment. A review of present day practice . J.B. Lyon Company: Albany, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Syphilis in pregnancy: an outline of its diagnosis and treatment . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, Tips for food handlers . New York, NY, undated.
Bureau of Social Hygiene, Department of Health, What you should know about syphilis . New York, NY, undated.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochure designed like a newsreel and single sheet with 20 questions and answers.

did.unittitle: United States, other sources
American Bar Association, Committee on Courts and War-time Social Protection, Venereal disease: prostitution and war . Washington, D.C., February 1943.
American Medical Association, Bureau of Health and Public Instruction, Facts about gonorrhea . Undated.
Brotherhood of Locomotive Firemen and Enginemen, Social hygiene . Cleveland, OH, undated.
Winslow, C.E.A., The Social hygiene program-today and tomorrow . New York: American Social Hygiene Association Incorporated, 1933.
Women's Christian Temperance Union, Social Purity Commitee, Two infectious diseases . Seattle, WA, September 1910.
Other countries
Liguwe National Belge Contre Le Peril Venerien, Les maladies vénériennes: conseils aux étudiants . Bruxelles, Belgium, undated.
Direccion Municipal De Higiene, La sifilis: su causa y tratamiento . Bogota, Columbia: Imprenta Municipal, undated.
Ministerio De Trabajo, Higiene Y Prevision Social, La sifilis . Bogota, Columbia: Imprenta Nacional, 1940.
Giles, F.W., M.B. (Durham), Council of the White Cross League, The campaign against syphilis . London, England: P.S. King & Son, LTD., 1915.

Aus der Medizinischen Universitatspoliklinik zu Rostock, Direktor: Prof. Dr. Hans Curschmann, Zur Symptomatologie seltener Formen d. Syphilis des Centralnervensystems . Leipzig, Germany: Druck von August Hoffman, 1917
Tovar De Lemos, A., Dispensario de Higiene Social Lisboa, Dispensários de higiene social . Lisboa, Portugal: Imprensa Libanio Da Silva. 1936.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a small note in English with brief description of the report.
